Interface RuleApp

All Known Subinterfaces:
IBuiltInRuleApp
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractAuxiliaryContractBuiltInRuleApp, AbstractBlockContractBuiltInRuleApp, AbstractBuiltInRuleApp, AbstractContractRuleApp, AbstractExternalSolverRuleApp, AbstractLoopContractBuiltInRuleApp, BlockContractExternalBuiltInRuleApp, BlockContractInternalBuiltInRuleApp, CloseAfterMergeRuleBuiltInRuleApp, ContractRuleApp, DefaultBuiltInRuleApp, InfFlowBlockContractInternalRule.InfFlowBlockContractInternalBuiltInRuleApp, InfFlowLoopInvariantBuiltInRuleApp, IsabelleRuleApp, JmlAssertBuiltInRuleApp, LoopApplyHeadBuiltInRuleApp, LoopContractExternalBuiltInRuleApp, LoopContractInternalBuiltInRuleApp, LoopInvariantBuiltInRuleApp, MergeRuleBuiltInRuleApp, NoPosTacletApp, OneStepSimplifierRuleApp, PosTacletApp, SetStatementBuiltInRuleApp, SMTRuleApp, TacletApp, UseDependencyContractApp
public interface RuleApp
Instances of this type accumulate the information for a specific rule application like application position, instantiations and more.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    checkApplicability()
    last minute check whether rule is applicable and throws an exception if not
    boolean
    complete()
    returns true if all variables are instantiated
    default String
    displayName()
     
    @Nullable PosInOccurrence
    posInOccurrence()
    the position where to apply the rule to which this application belongs
    void
    registerSkolemConstants(Namespace<@NonNull Function> fns)
    registers new Skolem functions to the provided namespace This method should be moved to the rule application logic, but remains for the moment here (checkApplicability() did also the registration before)
    Rule
    rule()
    returns the rule of this rule application

  • Method Details

    • rule

      Rule rule()
      returns the rule of this rule application

    • checkApplicability

      void checkApplicability()

      last minute check whether rule is applicable and throws an exception if not

      This is a debugging method, if an exception gets thrown there is nothing that can be done by the user

      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if rule is scheduled for application but not yet ready

    • registerSkolemConstants

      void registerSkolemConstants(Namespace<@NonNull Function> fns)
      registers new Skolem functions to the provided namespace This method should be moved to the rule application logic, but remains for the moment here (checkApplicability() did also the registration before)
      Parameters:
      fns - the Namespace where to register the Skolem functions

    • complete

      boolean complete()
      returns true if all variables are instantiated
      Returns:
      true if all variables are instantiated

    • displayName

      default String displayName()
      Returns:
      user-friendly name for this rule-application

    • posInOccurrence

      @Nullable PosInOccurrence posInOccurrence()
      the position where to apply the rule to which this application belongs
      Returns:
      the PosInOccurrence with the position information
